# Data Timeframes Report

**Last Updated**: 2026-05-14
**Source**: derived from [docs/reference/data-inventory.md](data-inventory.md) (auto-generated by `python -m yen_gov coverage`).
**Purpose**: one-page view of *what data we have, over what window, at what cadence* — for planning the next ingest.

> 69 indicator artifacts across 8 categories. Headline: deepest histories (≥30 yrs) are RBI HBS prices and state NSDP; widest gap is **state CPI sub-indices only go back to FY15** because RBI publishes them on the new CPI base only.

---

## Summary by category

| Category | Artifacts | Earliest | Latest | Notes |
| --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- |
| Demography | 1 | FY16 | FY26 | NITI iced only; no Census long-history yet. |
| Economy | 14 | **FY95** | FY26 | RBI NSDP gives 30y; NITI/MoSPI series start FY12. |
| Energy | 21 | FY06 | FY26 | National series (NITI iced) deep; CEA installed-capacity is snapshot-only. |
| Fiscal | 18 | **FY07** | FY26 | RBI national fiscal aggregates 19y; sansad.in state-fiscal lines only FY17–FY22. |
| Health | 5 | **CY03** | CY23 | SRS rates 20+ yrs; public-health-expenditure only FY13–FY20. |
| Human Development | 1 | snapshot | 2026-05 | NITI HDI snapshot — no time series yet. |
| Prices | 7 | **FY75** | FY25 | WPI 51y; CPI-IW 32y; CPI-Combined 14y; state CPI 11y. |
| Transport | 2 | FY01 | FY26 | EV registrations + EV-share — long but EV is rounding-error before FY15. |

---

These are the spine of any longitudinal "did governance work?" comparison.

| `economy/state_nsdp_current_inr_crore` | FY95–FY25 | **31** | annual | RBI |
| `economy/state_nsdp_constant_inr_crore` | FY95–FY25 | **31** | annual | RBI |

| `transport/state_ev_share_total_registrations_pct` | FY01–FY26 | 26 | annual | NITI iced |

| `health/state_death_rate_per_1000` | CY04–CY23 | 20 | annual | RBI (SRS) |

| `fiscal/state_pension_expenditure_inr_crore` | FY05–FY25 | 21 | annual | RBI |

| `fiscal/national_*` (8 RBI fiscal aggregates) | FY07–FY25 | 19 | annual | RBI |

## Snapshots only (no time dimension)

These are point-in-time and need a follow-up time series. Marked as snapshot in inventory.

| Indicator | As-of | Provider | Time-series upgrade path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `energy/installed_capacity_*_mw` (8 by-fuel + total + by-state) | 2026-03 | CEA | CEA monthly Executive Summary archive (every month back to ~2010) |
| `energy/installed_mw_by_state` | 2019 | community fork | replace with CEA monthly archive |
| `energy/national_renewable_potential_vs_installed_mw` | 2026-05-14 | NITI iced | inherently snapshot — potential + present-day stack |
| `human_development/state_hdi` | 2026-05-14 | NITI iced | UNDP/NITI publish NHDR ~every 3y; backfill possible |
| `fiscal/state_external_debt_inr_crore` | 2026-05-14 | sansad.in | Lok Sabha PQs are episodic; not a true series |

---

## Cadence breakdown

| Grain | # artifacts | Notes |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| `fiscal_year` | 47 | dominant cadence; `time = "YYYY-04"` |
| `year` (calendar) | 4 | SRS health indicators; `time = "YYYY"` |
| `month` | 8 | CEA installed-capacity snapshots; could be deepened |
| `quarter` | 1 | `economy/national_gva_by_industry_quarterly_*` |
| `date` | 9 | snapshots only — see table above |

---

## Source mix

| Provider | Artifacts | Reliability / cadence |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| `rbidocs.rbi.org.in` (RBI HBS-IS, HBS-IE, State Finances) | 24 | annual, late-year publication, deepest histories |
| `iced.niti.gov.in` (NITI ICED dashboard) | 26 | annual, refreshed within months of FY end |
| `www.data.gov.in` (MoSPI / open-data portal) | 4 | quarterly + annual |
| `www.rbi.org.in` (RBI direct) | 8 | annual (national fiscal aggregates) |
| `cea.nic.in` | 8 | monthly (currently only one snapshot ingested) |
| `sansad.in` (Lok Sabha PQ replies) | 7 | episodic — depends on which MP asked when |
| Other (raw.githubusercontent.com community fork) | 1 | replace with primary |

---

## Top gaps to close next (suggested priority)

1. **Deepen CEA installed-capacity from snapshot → monthly time series** (~16 yrs available). Same parser, just walk the monthly archive.
2. **Close the 4 deferred RBI HBS tables**: T05 MMR, T07 Life Expectancy, T16 PHC Doctors / Specialists, T17 Govt Hospitals & Beds. XLSX already cached at `.runtime/raw/rbi/handbook_states_2024_25/`.
3. **Census long-history demography**: state population at decadal granularity 1951–2011 + SRS estimates; current series only goes back to FY16.
4. **Replace sansad.in fiscal lines (FY17–FY22) with RBI State Finances**: the same indicators (own-tax, non-tax, central-share, grants, revenue-exp) have 19+ years on RBI; the sansad.in versions exist only because that was the first source we found.
5. **NHDR backfill** for HDI to give it at least 3 historical points.
6. **Education indicators** — entire category missing. UDISE+ (Ministry of Education) is the obvious source; annual since FY13.
7. **Crime / law-and-order** — entire category missing. NCRB Crime in India is annual since 1953 but PDF-only.

---

## How to read the inventory

The full per-indicator detail (rows, entities, Temporal Richness 7-cell meter) lives in [data-inventory.md](data-inventory.md). This timeframes report is a derived planning view; do not hand-edit either file outside of the structured updates described in [docs/architecture/backend/coverage.md](../architecture/backend/coverage.md).
